payload.answer: There is a conflict between the current memory, “Sam works at Goldman,” and the new fact, “Sam left Goldman and joined Point72.” The safe actions available are: approve_supersession, which accepts the new employment transition and treats the Goldman employment as no longer current; keep_both, which preserves both facts if the situation is ambiguous or both may be relevant; reject_new, which keeps the existing Goldman fact and does not commit the new Point72 claim; or edit, which lets the fact be clarified before saving.
citations: Existing current fact: Sam works at Goldman.
New fact: Sam left Goldman and joined Point72.

entity_resolution.reason: Both facts refer to Sam in the supplied employment-transition context, but no durable entity ID was provided.

memory_cards.statement: Sam left Goldman and joined Point72.

details: Explained only the backend-supplied safe actions.
Did not automatically supersede or delete any fact.
Preserved the conflict pending an explicit decision.
